response.justification: Bogdan is an experienced, versatile engineer with strong craftsmanship and communication skills, but he does not meet the role's core mandatory requirements. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments (2014-2015) rather than the required 5-10 years on Windows, his database background is MySQL/MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no fixed-income or capital-markets domain exposure — his fintech stint at RIDE Capital was TypeScript/Node work in a retail investment context, not investment banking systems.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience, including low-latency, high-throughput systems work (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and open-source authorship
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through conference talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, far short of the mandatory 5-10 years, with no Windows-platform C++ background
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; recent stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, MongoDB) is distant from the role's toolchain

key_factors.factor: C++ depth vs mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
Strong general engineering fundamentals and communication
